emptyState.title: No selection
emptyState.body: Select one or more items on the canvas to edit object properties here.

hints.locked: Locked on the canvas. Unlock before moving, resizing, or continuing path edits.

multiSelection.titleSelected: {count, plural, one {1 item selected} other {{count} items selected}}
multiSelection.subtitle: Bulk actions are available here. Open a single item from the canvas when you need detailed editing.

polyline.waypointsSubtitle: Adjust each point and its elevation.

listPanel.placedItemsSubtitle: Select an item from the list.

field.renderScaleTooltip: Internal canvas density in pixels per meter
field.pxPerMeterAriaLabel: pixels per meter, internal canvas scale

project.subtitle: Tune the project title, field setup, and available obstacle stock.

overview.title: Current layout
overview.subtitle: Review placed items, route numbering, and buildability for the current layout.
overview.emptyDescription: Add a few objects on the canvas to review the layout and compare it against your inventory.

inventory.description: TrackDraw compares the current layout against the obstacle stock saved in this project.

meta.typesShort: {count, plural, one {1 type short} other {{count} types short}}

messages.ready: {count, plural, one {1 route obstacle numbered.} other {{count} route obstacles numbered.}}
messages.noRouteMatches: {count, plural, one {1 route obstacle found, but none sit close enough to the race line.} other {{count} route obstacles found, but none sit close enough to the race line.}}
messages.missingRoute: {count, plural, one {1 route obstacle needs a race line before numbering can be derived.} other {{count} route obstacles need a race line before numbering can be derived.}}
messages.noNumberedObstacles: Gates, ladders, and dive gates will appear in route numbering.
messages.empty: Add route obstacles and a race line to derive numbering.

elevationChart.title: Elevation Profile
elevationChart.subtitle: Route height, colored warning sections, and route-review notes.
elevationChart.noWarnings: No route warnings for this path.

stub.summary: Path needs at least 2 waypoints to form a route
stub.title: Route is incomplete
stub.problem: The path needs at least two waypoints before TrackDraw can review it as a route.
stub.fix: Add another waypoint or finish drawing the race line.

flat.summary: No elevation set - 3D preview will be flat
flat.title: No elevation has been set
flat.problem: All waypoints are still at 0 m, so the 3D preview and elevation chart stay flat.
flat.fix: Set waypoint elevations in the inspector or 3D view if the route should climb or drop.

steep.summary: {count, plural, one {Steep grade near waypoint {first}} other {Steep grade at {count} segments}}
steep.title: Grade changes too quickly
steep.problem: One section climbs or drops sharply over a short distance, which can make the 3D line feel abrupt.
steep.fix: Spread the height change across more distance or add an intermediate waypoint.

hairpin.summary: {count, plural, one {Tight turn at waypoint {first}} other {{count} tight turns}}
hairpin.title: Turn is very tight
hairpin.problem: A waypoint creates a sharp reversal that may be hard to fly cleanly at speed.
hairpin.fix: Move the waypoint outward or add more room before and after the turn.

close-points.summary: {count, plural, one {Close waypoints near {first}} other {{count} closely spaced waypoints}}
close-points.title: Waypoints are too close
close-points.problem: Two waypoints are so close together that they create a tiny route segment.
close-points.fix: Delete one of the points or move it farther away from its neighbor.

spacing-shift.summary: {count, plural, one {Abrupt spacing shift near waypoint {first}} other {{count} abrupt spacing shifts}}
spacing-shift.title: Gate rhythm changes abruptly
spacing-shift.problem: The distance before and after a waypoint changes suddenly, which can make the route feel uneven.
spacing-shift.fix: Reposition nearby waypoints so the spacing changes more gradually.

rhythm-break.summary: {count, plural, one {Short correction segment near waypoint {first}} other {{count} short correction segments}}
rhythm-break.title: Short correction breaks the flow
rhythm-break.problem: A short middle segment interrupts longer surrounding sections and can create an awkward wobble.
rhythm-break.fix: Smooth the correction by moving the point, deleting it, or adding a gentler transition.

mapReference.title: Map reference
mapReference.subtitle: Choose the field center and align the field footprint.
mapReference.locationUnavailable: Location is unavailable in this browser.
